name: Jara (Jaroslava)
register: human, personal name; 'her aunt' relationally, lowercase
identity: Mila's aunt. Keeper of the Order. A wizard of a different kind - dark hair, blue eyes.
voice: Dry, deflecting, cheerful-armor over ruthless love; deadpan-ominous warnings; acts before fear can take root.
backstory: Raised Mila in the witch cottage; sends her through the portal on a pretext mission.
